subject: Re: EPU - TIFF vs TIF
body:
Hi Julio,

the GUI lets you specify TIFF instead of TIF as the input file extension. 
Does this not work?

Cheers,
Dimitry


On Tuesday, January 21, 2020 at 7:33:20 AM UTC+1, Ortiz, Julio wrote:
>
> Dear Dimitri,
>
>  
>
> I am wondering if someone is using WARP with the new version of EPU which 
> support the K3 camera.
>
> EPU is saving compressed non-corrected frames with the extension .tiff 
> (two “t”s). If I manually change the file extension to .tif (single “t”), 
> WARP works as usual with SerialEM.
>
> I am using staker2 to copy files from the original folder to the WARP 
> computer. 
>
> Do you have a solution different to make a home-made script to change the 
> file extension of the movies?
>
>  
>
> Saludos,
>
> Julio
>
>  
>
> Dr. Julio Ortiz
>
> Forschungszentrum Jülich GmbH
>
> Ernst Ruska-Centrum für Mikroskopie und Spektroskopie mit Elektronen
>
> ER-C-3: Strukturbiologie
